rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: ISO File Write to Suspicious Folder (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: ISO File Write to Suspicious Folder (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: bedf5cac-6332-4463-98ab-818f9e31234c
status: experimental
description: Detects files written to user downloads folder or appdata folder, associated
  with Mark-of-the-Web Bypass. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/mark-of-the-web-bypass/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.defense_evasion
- attack.t1553.005
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_iso:
    TargetFilename|endswith: .iso
  selection_user_downloads:
    TargetFilename|contains|all:
    - Users
    - Downloads
  selection_appdata:
    TargetFilename|contains: appdata
  condition: selection_iso and (selection_user_downloads or selection_appdata)
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
